subject: fast open deck boat
body:
Dear Jeffery
how are you,i am in las vegas till wed ,i was looking at some boats and came across this uk manufacturer please go through the website www.fjordboats,co,uk?this boat might suit your need i am plannig to order one for our use it costs something between 250000 to 265000 punds sterling the boat does 42 knots
hope to see you soon
sultan
